violations.text: The establishment does not employ a Rhode Island Certified Food Protection Manager. Establishment to certify with state. Application provided. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2024

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice machine) was observed with an accumulation of pink and black residue. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Ice machine was taken out of service during time of inspection. Ice machine cannot be used until cleaned and sanitized. New Violation. Correct By: 04/01/2024
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the quaternary ammonium sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024
The receptacle in the women's toilet room is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2024
